title: Samurai II: Duel at Ichijoji Temple
writer: Hideji Hôjô, Hiroshi Inagaki, Tokuhei Wakao
actors: Toshirô Mifune, Mariko Okada, Kôji Tsuruta
plot: Musashi Miyamoto returns to Kyoto after years of absence. After a series of fights against the Yoshioka School, he challenges its master to a duel.
